name: Qin Dynasty
note: State philosophy was Legalism — entirely different from Confucianism. Qin's brutal efficiency unified China but was ideologically rejected by every subsequent dynasty

figures.name: Qin Shi Huang
figures.significance: First Emperor of unified China; built the Great Wall and Terracotta Army; his title Huangdi was used by every subsequent emperor

figures.name: Li Si
figures.significance: Grand Councillor; architect of Qin Legalism and the first unified Chinese bureaucracy
